title: Candidate Hypothesis Review Question Set v0

sources.label: Trial Therapy Landscape Non-Advice Gate v0
Review-Packet Builder Input Manifest Spec v0
Case-To-Cure Stage Validator And Owner Map v0
Caregiver Intake Public Projection Validator v0

limitations: Not a real candidate-option record set.
Not a private multidisciplinary review packet.
Does not create, select, score, rank, compare, recommend, publish, or authorize candidate options for a real person.
Does not run literature, registry, regulatory, labeling, dataset, therapy, product, target, mechanism, or trial searches.
Does not process, normalize, store, route, publish, match, compare, rank, verify, or authorize use of real case-linked candidate hypotheses.

Does not contain patient-identifying data, private records, portal exports, molecular reports, pathology reports, flow reports, genomics reports, images, notes, raw assay values, therapy histories, exact dates tied to a person, facilities, clinicians, sponsor contacts, contact details, private case IDs, private workspace paths, private prompts, or re-identification keys.

Does not authorize clinical interpretation, trial-status verification, sponsor or site verification, patient matching, trial matching, target actionability, source ranking, evidence ranking, target ranking, mechanism ranking, product ranking, therapy ranking, trial ranking, option ranking, private-lab work, legal clearance, regulatory readiness, ethics readiness, security readiness, retention decisions, emergency handling, or publication of case-derived learning.
Does not validate multidisciplinary packet assembly, monitoring-plan, or public-learning extraction semantics.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
